Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and promotes appreciation of cultural diversity through 'Classic interpretation and cross-cultural perspective' (Target 4.7).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course focuses on 'Shi-Ji', a masterpiece of Chinese historical chronicles, which contributes to safeguarding the world's cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
